debug_info.goal:
x a : Fin 4 → ℝ
h₀ : Function.Injective a
h₁ : ∀ (i : Fin 4), ∑ j, |a i - a j| * x j = 1
⊢ (x 0, x 1, x 2, x 3) = Imo1966P5.solution_fun (a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3)

proof:
have := h₀.eq_iff
  let s := [a 0, a 1, a 2, a 3]
  have hmin : ∃ i, a i = s.min := by simp; exact List.min_mem _
  have hmax : ∃ i, a i = s.max := by simp; exact List.max_mem _
  obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hmin
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hmax
  have hne : a i ≠ a l := by rw [hi, hl]; exact List.min_ne_max_of_length_eq_succ (by decide)
  have hsol : ∀ k, x k = if k = i ∨ k = l then 1 / (a l - a i) else 0 := by
    intro k
    have hk : ∀ j, |a k - a j| = if j = k then 0 else |a k - a j| := fun j ↦ by split; simp [*]
    simp [h₁, hk, hi, hl, hne]
    split
    next h => simp [h, div_mul_cancel _ (abs_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero_of_ne hne)).ne']
    next h => simp [h]
  simp [solution_fun, hsol, hi, hl]
